rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Educ. Code §31.0701 defines references to state-developed open education resource instructional materials. The two provisions are unrelated; no conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 31.0701. REFERENCES TO STATE-DEVELOPED OPEN EDUCATION RESOURCE INSTRUCTIONAL MATERIAL. In this chapter, a reference to a state-developed open education resource instructional material means an open education resource instructional material, as defined by Section 31.002.
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption change and this education code provision.
